title: Trident Crafting & Structures 2
description: This mod adds a recipe for the trident and some structures
body:
Trident Crafting & Structures

This mod implements an original recipe for the trident and some structures to add a little bit of adventure to the game.

The structures are small sized and match with the mod's theme (oceans and water).

The recipes are simple but the materials to craft the trident aren't as easy to get, so it's not "op".

Owner - hir0shiyt
